mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM community
cwriter like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
ctitle like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
ccontent like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE community set hit=hit+1 WHERE cnum=#{cnum}
mapper.select: SELECT cnum, ctitle, cwriter, CCONTENT, chit, cdate, cimgn FROM community WHERE cnum=#{cnum}
